title: 10 best herbal capsules for gum swelling

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sage capsules helps with gum swelling because of its anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive compounds present in sage, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, have been shown to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with swollen gums. When taken orally, these compounds are absorbed into the bloodstream and reach the affected area, where they help to reduce swelling and ease discomfort. This natural remedy can provide relief from gum inflammation, making it a popular choice for those seeking an alternative or complementary approach to traditional treatments.
remedy_properties: Antimicrobial activity: Sage contains compounds that inhibit the growth of bacteria, viruses, and fungi, which can cause gum infections and inflammation, thus reducing swelling.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The flavonoids and phenolic acids in sage have anti-inflammatory effects, which help to reduce redness, swelling, and pain associated with gum swelling.
Antioxidant activity: Sage's antioxidant properties help protect the gums from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to gum swelling and inflammation.
remedy_constituents: Rosmarinic acid: As a phenolic compound, rosmarinic acid has anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce swelling and inflammation in the gums.
Salvianolic acid: This flavonoid has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate gum swelling and protect the gums from damage caused by oxidative stress.
Carnosic acid: With its ability to inhibit inflammatory enzymes, carnosic acid can help reduce inflammation and swelling in the gums, promoting a healthy oral environment.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are rich in antioxidants and contain compounds like tannins and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce gum swelling.
Roots: The roots of Salvia officinalis contain sesquiterpenes and phenolic compounds, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote healing in the gums.
Buds: The buds of the plant are rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote healing in the gums, making them effective for gum swelling.
remedy_recipe: Dry the salvia officinalis leaves in a low-temperature oven at 105 degrees fahrenheit for 2 hours.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder for 5 minutes.
Mix the powder with a capsule filling machine to achieve a dosage of 300 milligrams per capsule.
Fill the capsules using a capsule filling machine and seal them immediately to prevent contamination.
Store the capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Peppermint capsules helps with gum swelling because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties. When taken orally, the menthol in peppermint capsules is absorbed into the bloodstream and travels to the affected areas, reducing inflammation and pain associated with swollen gums. Additionally, peppermint's natural antibacterial agents help combat underlying infections that may be contributing to the swelling, promoting a healthy and balanced oral environment. By targeting both the cause and symptoms of gum swelling, herbal peppermint capsules offer a natural and effective solution for maintaining a happy and healthy smile.
remedy_properties: Menthol: Menthol's cooling and anti-inflammatory properties help reduce gum swelling by constricting blood vessels, decreasing blood flow to the affected area, and numbing the pain.

Catechins: The catechin compounds present in peppermint leaves have potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress that contribute to gum swelling.

Eucalyptol: Eucalyptol's analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties help to numb the affected area, reducing pain and discomfort associated with gum swelling, while also helping to reduce inflammation.
remedy_constituents: Rosmarinic Acid: As a phenolic compound, rosmarinic acid has anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and alleviate pain associated with gum inflammation.
Menthol: As a terpene, menthol has a local anesthetic effect that numbs the gum tissues, reducing pain and discomfort caused by inflammation.
Luteolin: As a flavonoid, luteolin has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce swelling, prevent tissue damage, and promote healing in the affected gum tissues.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Mentha x piperita leaves are used to make capsules for gum swelling due to their high oil content, particularly menthol, which helps to numb the gums and reduce inflammation.
Stems: Mentha x piperita stems contain a significant amount of menthol, which is responsible for their analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, making them useful for gum swelling.
Leaves: The leaves of Mentha x piperita are also used due to their antimicrobial properties, which help to prevent infection and promote healing in the gums.
remedy_recipe: Dry the fresh leaves of mentha x piperita in a low-temperature oven at 35 degrees celsius for 30 minutes.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Mix 200 milligrams of the powdered leaves with 500 milligrams of a natural capsule filler for 2 minutes.
Fill 100-count gelatin capsules with the powder mixture and seal them immediately to preserve freshness.
Store the herbal mentha x piperita capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 12 months.

remedy_properties: Inflammation-reducing flavonoids: Flavonoids present in Kansas coneflower have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce gum inflammation and swelling by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines.

Antioxidant phenolic acids: Phenolic acids found in Kansas coneflower have antioxidant effects, which help neutralize free radicals that contribute to gum tissue damage and swelling, promoting healthy gum tissue and reducing inflammation.

Anti-bacterial triterpenoids: Triterpenoids present in Kansas coneflower have antibacterial properties that help combat the growth of bacteria associated with periodontal disease, which can contribute to gum swelling and infection.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Kansas coneflower capsules helps with gum swelling because they contain potent anti-inflammatory compounds, including salicin and flavonoids. These natural agents work to reduce inflammation and alleviate discomfort associated with swollen gums. The capsules also contain antioxidants that help combat oxidative stress, which can contribute to gum inflammation. By targeting the root causes of gum swelling, Kansas coneflower capsules provide a holistic approach to promoting healthy gums and a comfortable smile.
remedy_constituents: Iridoid glycosides: Iridoid glycosides, such as echinacoside and alkylamides, may help with gum swelling by reducing inflammation and modulating immune responses.
Alkylamides: Alkylamides have anti-inflammatory properties, which could help alleviate gum swelling by reducing swelling and discomfort.
Polyacetylenes: Polyacetylenes, such as echinacolide and echinacin, have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which could help combat gum inflammation and infection.
remedy_parts: Roots: Echinacea angustifolia roots are commonly used to make capsules for gum swelling due to their high concentration of compounds that have anti-inflammatory properties.
Barks: Echinacea angustifolia barks are used because they contain chemicals that have antimicrobial properties, which help in reducing gum inflammation and swelling.
Leaves: Echinacea angustifolia leaves are used for their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce gum swelling and promote healing.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 2-3 pounds of echinacea angustifolia roots in late summer or early fall.
Clean and dry the roots thoroughly by spreading them out in a single layer.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Fill gelatin capsules with 250-500 milligrams of the echinacea angustifolia powder.
Label and store the capsules in an airtight container to preserve freshness.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Guggul capsules helps with gum swelling because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties. The herb, Commiphora mukul, has been traditionally used to reduce inflammation and ease pain in various parts of the body. When taken as a supplement, guggul capsules can help combat gum inflammation and reduce swelling by suppressing the production of pro-inflammatory chemicals in the body. This natural approach helps alleviate symptoms associated with gum disease, promoting healthy gums and overall oral health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Herbal Guggul capsules have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce inflammation and swelling in the gums, making them an effective remedy for gum swelling.
Antimicrobial: The antimicrobial properties of Guggul help combat bacterial infections that can cause gum swelling and inflammation, promoting a healthy oral environment.
Immunomodulatory: Guggul's immunomodulatory effects help regulate the immune system's response to gum inflammation, reducing oxidative stress and promoting healing.
remedy_constituents: Guggulsterones: These steroidal compounds help with gum swelling by reducing inflammation and promoting anti-inflammatory responses in the body.
Commiphoric acid: This compound exhibits anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate gum swelling by reducing oxidative stress and inflammation.
Guggul lipid fraction: This fraction contains a combination of compounds, including terpenes and phenolics, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects that help reduce gum swelling.
remedy_parts: Barks: They are used because of their guggulsterone content, which helps in reducing inflammation and swelling in the gums.
Roots: The roots of Commiphora mukul are used for their anti-inflammatory properties, which help in reducing gum swelling and pain.
remedy_recipe: Collect 500 grams of dried commiphora mukul roots and 500 grams of gelatin powder for capsule formation.
Grind 250 grams of the dried roots into a fine powder using a grinder at 300 rpm for 30 minutes.
Mix 250 grams of the ground powder with 250 grams of the gelatin powder in a large bowl.
Fill 200 empty gelatin capsules with the mixture from step 3 using a capsule filling machine at 20 capsules per minute.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with gum swelling because they contain compounds that possess anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive compounds in licorice root, such as glycyrrhizin and isoliquiritigenin, have been shown to reduce inflammation and swelling in the mouth by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes. By taking herbal licorice capsules, individuals can potentially alleviate gum swelling caused by periodontal disease, gingivitis, or other oral health issues, promoting a healthier and more comfortable oral environment.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: This compound has anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce swelling and alleviate pain in the gums by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes.
Flavonoids: The flavonoids present in licorice root have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help protect the gums from damage caused by free radicals and reduce inflammation.
Saponins: Saponins, a type of triterpenoid, have antiviral and antibacterial properties that help combat infections and prevent gum disease, reducing swelling in the process.
remedy_constituents: Licorice Flavonoids (Glycyrrhizin): Glycyrrhizin has anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce swelling and inflammation in the gums by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes.

Isoliquiritigenin (ILG): ILG has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to reduce gum swelling by preventing the formation of reactive oxygen species and inhibiting the activity of inflammatory mediators.

Liquiritin Apiside (LAP): LAP has anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory properties, which help to reduce gum swelling by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines and promoting the production of anti-inflammatory cytokines.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are rich in glycyrrhizin, a compound responsible for the anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help in reducing gum swelling.
Leaves: They also contain glycyrrhizin, which helps in soothing the gums and reducing inflammation.
Barks: The barks of Glycyrrhiza glabra contain glycyrrhizin, which is used to create capsules for its anti-inflammatory properties to treat gum swelling.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 10-15 dried roots of glycyrrhiza glabra from a trusted supplier or cultivated source.
Grind 500 grams of the dried roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 5 minutes.
Mix 20 grams of the powder with 50 grams of starch or cellulose powder as a filler.
Fill 1000 capsule shells with 500 milligrams of the powder mixture using a capsule filler for 10 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in a cool dry place protected from light for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsules helps with gum swelling because they contain mucilage, a thick, protective substance that soothes and coats the gum tissue. When taken orally, the mucilage is absorbed into the bloodstream and delivered to the affected area, where it helps to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. The herb's anti-inflammatory properties also help to shrink swollen gums, promoting healthy gum function and reducing the risk of further irritation or infection.
remedy_properties: Mucilage: Marshmallow root contains mucilage, a thick, protective substance that forms a soothing film on the gums and oral tissues, reducing inflammation and discomfort.

Anti-inflammatory compounds: Marshmallow contains anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which help to reduce gum swelling by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory chemicals in the body.
Glycoproteins: Marshmallow root also contains glycoproteins, which have been shown to have a direct anti-inflammatory effect on the gums, reducing redness, swelling, and pain.
remedy_constituents: Mucilages: Mucilages help with gum swelling by forming a soothing, protective barrier on the mucous membranes, reducing inflammation and discomfort.
Polysaccharides: Polysaccharides, such as pectin, help with gum swelling by promoting the healing of mucous membranes and reducing inflammation through their anti-inflammatory properties.

Iridoid Glycosides: Iridoid glycosides help with gum swelling by exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce swelling and promote the healing of inflamed mucous membranes.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in mucilages, which help to soothe and protect the mucous membranes, reducing inflammation and discomfort in the gums.
Leaves: Also contain mucilages that can help to reduce inflammation and promote healing in the gums, making them a suitable alternative to roots.
Stems: Similar to roots and leaves, the stems of Althaea officinalis contain mucilages that can help to soothe and protect the gums, reducing swelling and discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50g of dried root of althaea officinalis from a trusted supplier or cultivate it yourself.
Weigh out 10g of the dried root and grind it into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered root with 20g of tapioca starch in a bowl to achieve a uniform consistency.
Fill 50 empty gelatin capsules with 400mg of the root and starch mixture each.
Store the capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with gum swelling because they contain bioactive compounds that have potent anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's root and leaves are rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and triterpenoids, which can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the mouth. By taking dandelion capsules regularly, individuals may experience a reduction in gum swelling, pain, and discomfort associated with conditions like gingivitis and periodontitis. This natural remedy has been traditionally used to support oral health and promote healthy gums.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Dandelion root has been shown to reduce inflammation, which is a major contributor to gum swelling, by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory chemicals and enzymes.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in dandelion root help to neutralize free radicals that can damage oral tissues and contribute to gum swelling, promoting overall oral health and reducing inflammation.
Immune-stimulating properties: Dandelion root has been found to stimulate the immune system, which helps to fight off infections that can cause gum swelling, such as gum disease or periodontitis.
remedy_constituents: Inulin: Inulin has anti-inflammatory properties that may help reduce swelling in the gums by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes.
Taraxasterol: Taraxasterol, a triterpenoid saponin, has shown anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects that may help alleviate gum swelling by reducing oxidative stress and inflammation.

Apigenin: Apigenin, a flavonoid, exhibits anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that may help combat gum inflammation and swelling by inhibiting the growth of bacteria and reducing inflammation.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Contain taraxasterol, which has anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce gum swelling.
Roots: Contain inulin and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and soothing effects on the gums.
Seeds: Contain taraxasterol and other compounds with anti-inflammatory properties that help alleviate gum swelling and pain.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50 grams of taraxacum officinale root and leaves in the morning when dew is still present.
Clean and dry the plant material in a low-temperature oven at 50 degrees celsius for 2 hours.
Grind the dried material into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 5 minutes.
Mix 250 milligrams of the powder with 250 milligrams of vegetable cellulose powder in a small bowl.
Fill gelatin capsules with the mixture and seal them using a gelatin capsule sealer.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Corydal capsules helps with gum swelling because they contain a potent blend of herbal extracts that work synergistically to reduce inflammation and alleviate discomfort. The bioactive compounds in these capsules, such as salicin and polyphenols, have natural anti-inflammatory properties that help to soothe and calm the affected area. As a result, Corydal capsules can effectively alleviate swollen gums, promote healthy gum tissue, and restore overall oral health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Corydal capsules contain flavonoids and alkaloids that have anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce swelling and pain in the gums by inhibiting the production of prostaglandins.
Antimicrobial: The capsules also possess antimicrobial properties, which inhibit the growth of bacteria and viruses that can cause gum inflammation and infection, thereby reducing swelling.
Antioxidant: The antioxidants present in Corydal capsules help protect the gums from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to inflammation and swelling.
remedy_constituents: Protostephanine: It has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce swelling and inflammation in the gums.
Corydaline: This alkaloid has analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it beneficial in reducing pain and inflammation associated with gum swelling.
Corynoline: It has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate gum inflammation and promote overall oral health.
remedy_parts: Roots: Contain bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory properties, helping to reduce gum swelling.
Leaves: Have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe and heal gum inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1-2 pounds of corydalis cava roots and dry them in a warm place for 2-3 weeks.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for about 10 minutes.
Mix 10-20 grams of the powder with a binding agent like gelatin and add 1-2 tablespoons of water.
Use a capsule machine to fill empty capsules with the mixture and seal them tightly.
Store the capsules in an airtight container in a cool place protected from light for up to 1 year.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English lavender capsules helps with gum swelling because they possess anti-inflammatory properties that effectively reduce inflammation in the gums. The calming effects of lavender also help to relax the muscles surrounding the gums, which can become tense due to gum irritation or infection. Additionally, lavender's antiseptic and antibacterial properties work together to combat underlying infections, promoting a healthy environment for the gums to heal and reducing swelling.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Lavender's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as linalool and linalyl acetate, help reduce swelling and pain in the gums by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory chemicals.
Antimicrobial property: The antimicrobial properties of lavender, including its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, can help prevent infections that contribute to gum swelling.
Calming and soothing property: Lavender's calming and soothing effects can help reduce stress and anxiety, which are common triggers for gum inflammation and swelling.
remedy_constituents: Linalool: A terpene that has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce swelling in the gums by reducing inflammation and promoting healing.
Linalyl acetate: Another terpene in Lavandula angustifolia that has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help prevent infections and reduce swelling in the gums.
Rosmarinic acid: A phenolic compound with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation, prevent tissue damage, and promote healing in the gums.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They contain essential oils and flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory properties to help reduce gum swelling.
Flowers: They are a rich source of flavonoids, particularly luteolin and apigenin, which have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties to alleviate gum inflammation.
Stems: They may be used to make capsules due to their content of essential oils and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory properties to help reduce gum swelling and promote healing.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50g of dried lavandula angustifolia flowers at the peak of potency within 2-3 years after planting.
Clean and dry the harvested flowers in a low-temperature oven at 50°c for 2 hours.
Grind 20g of the dried flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 1 minute.
Fill 50 herbal capsules with 200mg of the ground powder using a capsule filler machine.
Store the herbal capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Jesuit's bark capsules helps with gum swelling because they contain a unique compound called catechin, which has potent anti-inflammatory properties. This natural ingredient works to reduce the inflammation and discomfort associated with swollen gums, allowing for improved oral health and reduced pain. The capsule also contains other beneficial compounds that help to soothe and calm the affected area, promoting a faster recovery and reducing the risk of further complications.
remedy_properties: Flavonoids: Jesuit's Bark Capsules contain flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to reduce gum inflammation and swelling by neutralizing free radicals and reducing pro-inflammatory compounds.
Alkaloids: The capsules contain alkaloids, including berberine, which has antimicrobial and antifungal properties, helping to prevent gum infections that can contribute to swelling.

Phenolic acids: Jesuit's Bark Capsules are rich in phenolic acids, such as caffeic acid and ferulic acid, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, helping to reduce gum inflammation and promote healing.
remedy_constituents: Quinine: Quinine, an alkaloid, helps reduce gum swelling by its anti-inflammatory properties, which can alleviate pain and swelling associated with gum infections.
Quinidine: Quinidine, another alkaloid, has anti-inflammatory and astringent properties that help reduce gum swelling and alleviate pain.
Quercetin: Quercetin, a flavonoid, acts as an anti-inflammatory agent that helps reduce gum swelling and alleviate pain by inhibiting the production of inflammatory enzymes.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves of Cinchona officinalis are primarily used to make capsules for gum swelling due to their high content of quinine and other alkaloids.
Barks: The barks of Cinchona officinalis are used to make capsules for gum swelling due to their alkaloid content, which helps to reduce inflammation and swelling.
Stems: The stems of Cinchona officinalis are sometimes used to make capsules for gum swelling, although this is less common, as they still contain alkaloids that aid in reducing inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Collect 100 grams of dried cinchona officinalis bark from a trusted supplier or your garden harvest.
Grind the dried bark into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix 10 grams of the powdered cinchona officinalis with 90 grams of vegetable cellulose powder in a bowl.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the mixture using a small spoon and work in a well-lit area.
Label and store the capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree capsules helps with gum swelling because they contain flavonoids, a type of antioxidant that has been shown to possess anti-inflammatory properties. When taken orally, these flavonoids can reach the gums and help reduce inflammation and swelling caused by gingivitis, plaque buildup, and other gum-related issues. Additionally, the capsules' ability to stimulate blood circulation may also aid in delivering oxygen and nutrients to the affected area, promoting healthy gum tissue and reducing swelling.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Ginkgo biloba capsules contain bioactive compounds like flavonoids and terpenes, which have been shown to reduce inflammation in the mouth and gums, thereby helping to alleviate gum swelling.
Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in Maidenhair Tree capsules help neutralize free radicals that can contribute to oxidative stress, which may exacerbate gum swelling and inflammation.
Vasodilatory effects: Ginkgo biloba's vasodilatory properties may help improve blood flow to the gums, reducing swelling by increasing oxygen delivery and nutrients to the affected area.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the maidenhair tree contain a high concentration of anti-inflammatory compounds, making them effective in reducing gum swelling.
Barks: The barks of the maidenhair tree have been shown to possess antibacterial properties, which can help combat infections that contribute to gum swelling.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh ginkgo biloba leaves from healthy trees and rinse them thoroughly with distilled water.
Dry the ginkgo biloba leaves using a food dehydrator at 60 degrees celsius for six hours.
Grind the dried ginkgo biloba leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix one teaspoon of ground ginkgo biloba with 100 milliliters of distilled water to create a tincture, allowing it to steep for 10 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the cooled ginkgo biloba tincture, sealing them tightly and storing them in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Henbane capsules helps with gum swelling because they contain a unique combination of herbal extracts that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The active compounds in henbane, such as hyoscyamine and scopolamine, work together to reduce inflammation and ease pain in the gums, helping to alleviate swelling and discomfort. Additionally, henbane's antibacterial properties help to combat the underlying causes of gum disease, promoting a healthy oral environment and reducing the risk of further inflammation.
remedy_properties: Antibacterial properties: Henbane contains compounds like pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been shown to inhibit the growth of bacteria that can contribute to gum inflammation and swelling.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The capsaicin-like compound solanine in henbane has anti-inflammatory effects, helping to reduce swelling and discomfort associated with gum inflammation.
Antioxidant properties: Henbane's rich antioxidant content helps protect the gums from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to chronic inflammation and swelling.
remedy_parts: Roots: Henbane roots have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and alleviate pain in gum tissues.
Barks: The barks of the henbane plant contain compounds that help soothe inflammation and reduce discomfort associated with gum swelling.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh hyoscyamus niger roots and clean them thoroughly with distilled water.
Dry the cleaned roots in a warm ventilated area for 7-10 days or use a dehydrator at 40°c for 24 hours.
Grind dried roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 500mg of powdered hyoscyamus niger with 250ml of distilled water and 50g of gelatin to form capsules.
Fill empty capsules with the mixture and seal them immediately to preserve potency for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Amur corktree capsules helps with gum swelling because they contain potent anti-inflammatory compounds that effectively reduce inflammation and ease discomfort in the gums. The plant-based extracts in the capsules work to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes, thereby reducing swelling and promoting a healthy gum environment. Additionally, Amur corktree has been traditionally used to treat various oral health issues, including gum inflammation and periodontitis, making it a natural and effective solution for soothing swollen gums.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: The capsules contain flavonoids and terpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory effects that help reduce swelling and alleviate pain in the gums.

Antimicrobial properties: The capsules' active ingredients, such as berberine and amurensin, exhibit antimicrobial activity, inhibiting the growth of bacteria and fungi that can cause gum inflammation and infection.

Wound-healing and anti-scarring compounds: Amur Corktree extracts contain bioactive compounds like phlobaphenes and lignans, which promote wound healing, reduce scar tissue formation, and improve oral mucosa integrity.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help reduce gum inflammation and swelling.
Barks: Contain tannins and flavonoids that have antimicrobial properties, inhibiting the growth of bacteria that can cause gum disease.
Seeds: High in omega-6 fatty acids, which reduce inflammation and promote healing of inflamed gums.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality dried phellodendron amurense bark according to established botanical standards and store in an airtight container.
Grind the dried phellodendron amurense bark into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or spice grinder for approximately 15 minutes.
Mix the powdered phellodendron amurense with 5 grams of vegetable filler such as cornstarch or potato starch to create a uniform blend.
Use a capsule machine to fill gelatin capsules with 200-250 milligrams of the blended mixture and seal according to manufacturer's instructions for approximately 30 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature away from direct sunlight and moisture for up to six months or as directed.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules help with gum swelling because they contain curcumin, a potent anti-inflammatory compound that targets inflammation at its root cause. By reducing inflammation, turmeric capsules can alleviate swollen gums and prevent further irritation. The active compound in turmeric also has antioxidant properties, which help to protect the gums from damage caused by free radicals. As a result, turmeric capsules can promote healthy gums and provide relief from gum swelling.
remedy_properties: Curcumin: Curcumin, a bioactive compound found in turmeric, has potent anti-inflammatory properties, which helps to reduce swelling and alleviate pain in gums by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes.
Corticosteroids: Turmeric's corticosteroid-like activity helps to decrease inflammation and swelling in gum tissue, reducing redness and tenderness, while also promoting healing and recovery.
Antioxidants: The antioxidant properties of turmeric help to protect the gums from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to chronic inflammation and gum disease.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The main source of curcuminoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce gum swelling.
Roots: Used to extract essential oils and compounds that soothe and calm irritated gums, reducing inflammation and pain.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50g of dried turmeric root powder from curcuma longa plants.
Mix the turmeric powder with 200mg of guggul resin and 100mg of triphala powder.
Add a binding agent like acacia gum or gelatin to the mixture at 10% concentration.
Fill the mixture into vegetarian capsules and seal them immediately after filling.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Elder capsules helps with gum swelling because of their potent anti-inflammatory properties. The natural compounds present in elder, such as flavonoids and terpenes, have been shown to reduce inflammation in the body, including in the gums. This can help alleviate symptoms associated with gum disease, such as redness, puffiness, and tenderness. By reducing swelling, herbal elder capsules promote a healthy environment for gums to heal and regenerate, leading to improved overall oral health and reduced risk of complications like periodontitis.
remedy_properties: Antioxidants: Elderberry's rich antioxidant content helps reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the gums, which can contribute to swelling.
Anti-inflammatory compounds: Elderberries contain anti-inflammatory polyphenols like anthocyanins and flavonoids, which can help reduce swelling by suppressing inflammatory responses in the gums.

Vasodilatory effects: The bioactive compounds in elderberry may also help dilate blood vessels, improving blood flow to the gums and reducing inflammation, swelling, and pain associated with gum problems.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are rich in anti-inflammatory compounds, making them effective in reducing swelling and discomfort associated with gum inflammation.
Barks: Elder bark contains flavonoids that help to reduce gum inflammation and alleviate pain, making it an effective natural remedy for gum swelling.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500 grams of sambucus nigra leaves and flowers fresh from the garden or forest.
Dry the plant material in a well-ventilated area for 7-10 days, stirring occasionally, until crumbly and brittle.
Grind the dried sambucus nigra into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle, taking approximately 30 minutes to complete.
Mix one part of the powdered sambucus nigra with three parts of potato starch or magnesium stearate, and store in an airtight container for up to six months.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with a dosage of 400-500 milligrams of the powdered sambucus nigra blend per capsule, sealed immediately after filling.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chinese rhubarb capsules helps with gum swelling because they contain a unique combination of bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory properties. The capsule's active ingredients, including emodin and rhein, are known to reduce inflammation in the gums by suppressing the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes. Additionally, the capsules' ability to regulate blood flow may help alleviate swelling by increasing oxygenation and nutrient delivery to affected areas.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Chinese Rhubarb Capsules contain compounds that reduce inflammation, which helps to alleviate gum swelling by decreasing the redness and puffiness associated with periodontal disease.

Antioxidant property: The antioxidants present in Chinese Rhubarb Capsules help protect the gums from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to gum swelling and inflammation.
Astringent property: Chinese Rhubarb Capsules have astringent compounds that help to reduce excess fluid and tissue swelling in the gums, thereby relieving gum swelling and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are rich in anthraquinone glycosides, which have anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties that help to reduce gum swelling.
Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes contain sennosides, which can stimulate the bowel movements and relieve constipation, a common underlying cause of gum swelling.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh rheum palmatum roots in spring or fall, ensuring they are free of any visible mold or decay.
Wash the roots thoroughly with cold water, then chop them into small pieces and soak in vodka for at least 14 days.
Strain the liquid from the soaking mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter, discarding the solids and transferring the liquid to a clean glass jar.
Mix one part of the extracted liquid with three parts of organic gelatin capsules, filling each capsule with approximately 500mg of the herbal extract, and seal immediately.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months or freeze for longer preservation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Aloe capsules helps with gum swelling because they contain bioactive compounds that have potent anti-inflammatory properties. When consumed orally, these compounds are absorbed into the bloodstream and travel to the gums, where they help reduce inflammation and alleviate swelling. The aloe gel also contains vitamins A, C, and E, which are known for their antioxidant properties, further aiding in the relief of gum swelling by neutralizing free radicals that can contribute to inflammation.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Aloe vera's anti-inflammatory compounds reduce swelling and pain by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory chemicals, thus alleviating gum inflammation.
Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in aloe vera neutralize free radicals and protect the gums from oxidative stress, which can contribute to gum swelling and damage.

Wound-healing properties: Aloe vera's gel accelerates wound healing by promoting collagen synthesis, improving tissue hydration, and enhancing the growth of new epithelial cells, all of which help reduce gum swelling and promote healthy gum tissue.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in anti-inflammatory compounds, such as aloin and aloe-emodin, which help reduce swelling and alleviate pain associated with gum inflammation.
Rhyzomes: Contains a variety of bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective against gum swelling.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of pure aloe vera gel from fresh aloe vera leaves.
Dry the aloe vera gel in a warm air oven at 50 degrees celsius for 24 hours.
Grind 200 milligrams of dried aloe vera powder into a fine paste using a mortar and pestle.
Mix 100 milliliters of distilled water with 500 milligrams of the aloe vera paste to create a uniform solution.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with 250 milligrams of the aloe vera solution and store in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Fennel capsules helps with gum swelling because of its anti-inflammatory properties. The herb contains a compound called fenchone, which has been shown to reduce inflammation in the body by blocking the production of prostaglandins, which are hormones that cause pain and swelling. Additionally, fennel's antioxidant properties help to neutralize free radicals that can damage gum tissue and contribute to swelling. By taking fennel capsules regularly, individuals can experience a reduction in gum swelling and discomfort associated with conditions such as gingivitis and periodontitis.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Fennel capsules contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce inflammation and swelling in the gums.
Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants present in fennel capsules neutralize free radicals that can cause damage to gum tissue, reducing inflammation and promoting healing.
Digestive benefits: Fennel's carminative and antispasmodic properties help alleviate digestive issues like bloating and gas, which are often linked to gum swelling and oral health problems.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the fennel plant contain compounds that help reduce inflammation and soothe swollen gums.
Seeds: Fennel seeds have anti-inflammatory properties that can alleviate pain and discomfort associated with gum swelling.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh foeniculum vulgare leaves and stems from a clean environment with proper equipment sterilization.
Dry the harvested foeniculum vulgare leaves and stems using a food dehydrator at 35 degrees celsius for 24 hours.
Grind dried foeniculum vulgare into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or spice grinder at room temperature for 30 seconds.
Mix 2 teaspoons of the ground foeniculum vulgare powder with 1 teaspoon of gelatin and 6 ounces of distilled water in a double boiler until dissolved completely within 15 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the prepared foeniculum vulgare mixture, using a capsule filler machine or manual filling process at room temperature for 30 seconds per capsule.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sweet marjoram capsules helps with gum swelling because they contain a potent anti-inflammatory compound called terpinen-4-ol, which effectively reduces swelling and pain in the gums. The capsules also contain other bioactive compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids that have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial properties, helping to combat underlying infections that may contribute to gum inflammation. As a result, marjoram capsules provide a natural and effective way to alleviate gum swelling, promoting healthy gums and reducing the risk of gum disease.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Marjoram's flavonoids and terpenes, such as luteolin and borneol, have anti-inflammatory effects that reduce swelling and pain in the gums.

Antioxidant properties: Marjoram's antioxidant compounds, like rosmarinic acid, help protect gum tissue from oxidative damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to inflammation and swelling.

Wound-healing properties: Marjoram's essential oils and flavonoids promote wound healing by improving blood flow, reducing scar formation, and enhancing collagen synthesis, all of which can help reduce gum swelling.
remedy_parts: Roots: Sweet marjoram roots are rich in anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce gum inflammation and swelling.
Buds: Marjoram buds contain antioxidants that help protect gums from damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthy gum tissue.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of dried origanum majorana leaves from a trusted source for optimal potency.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for 30 seconds.
Mix the powdered origanum majorana with 200mg of gelatin capsules in a bowl, ensuring an even distribution for 1 minute.
Fill empty vegetable oil-based softgel capsules with the mixture and seal them immediately to prevent oxidation for 5 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature away from direct sunlight for up to 6 months.

intro_desc: Herbal capsules for gum swelling are natural supplements that contain a blend of herbs and botanicals specifically designed to reduce inflammation and alleviate gum pain associated with swollen gums. They work by promoting healthy gum tissue, reducing bacteria in the mouth, and improving oral hygiene. Examples of herbal capsules that help with gum swelling include Turmeric, Ginger, and Echinacea. By taking these capsules, individuals can experience significant relief from gum discomfort, enabling them to chew and speak normally again.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to gum swelling that are treated with herbal capsules are conditions such as joint inflammation, arthritis, and tendonitis. These herbs work by reducing pain and inflammation, promoting healing, and improving circulation. Examples of herbal remedies used to treat these conditions include turmeric, ginger, ashwagandha, and willow bark, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help alleviate symptoms.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal capsules that help with gum swelling is Turmeric (Curcumin) and Echinacea. Turmeric contains anti-inflammatory properties that reduce swelling and pain, while Echinacea boosts the immune system to fight off underlying infections. Additionally, incorporating capsules with Ginger and Licorice root may also be beneficial, as they possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can help soothe and heal swollen gums. This combination can be taken under the guidance of a healthcare professional for optimal results.
intro_study: For example, according to a study published by Journal of education and health promotion, herbal products have been found to be effective and safe alternatives for oral health care. The study, which involved a systematic review of 49 original research studies on the effectiveness of medicinal plants and herbal products for oral health, found that interventions using herbal products were effective in treating a range of oral diseases, including periodontal and gingival diseases. Specifically, the study found that herbal products containing chamomile and Aloe vera were particularly effective, which may be beneficial in reducing gum swelling.
